CandidateApplication.FormularySent2: We thank you for submitting your application, the registration of which has been duly completed.
CandidateApplication.FormularySent3: In the event that your profile proves to be in accordance with the evaluation criteria established by our client, a recruitment officer will contact you within five days.
CandidateApplication.FormularySent4: If your application is pre-selected for the job you are applying for, we will contact you within 7 days.
CandidateApplication.FormularySent5: After this period, without a response from us, we may consider that your application has not been accepted for this position or that the position has already been filled.
CandidateApplication.FormularySent6: Do not hesitate to consult our website and follow us on social networks to discover the new positions to be filled.

Dashboard.ApplyDreamJob1: Apply for the offers of your dreams!
Dashboard.DashboardIntro1: To help you maximise your chances of finding the right job in a private home, we this space for you.
Dashboard.DashboardIntro2: You can read the documents you are asked to provide and complete your application. file. Your space also allows you to manage your job search efficiently by consulting your applications and their status as well as your scheduled and past interviews. MMI selects for you offers that correspond to your profile and your wishes.
Dashboard.DashboardIntro3: Our consultants urge you to create your CV from the My MMI CV tab to boost your job search and your job search and give yourself the best chance of attracting potential employers.
Dashboard.YouCanExchangeBy: You can communicate with the consultants of Morgan & Mallet International via written message or by telephone.

Resume.CharactersOut: characters out of the required minimum of 10.
Resume.CompleteDossierMandatory: We will not consider your application without a complete dossier. Not only because it presents your professional career, assesses your abilities and skills as a candidate, but also for reasons of security for our clients.
Resume.ConsultantInformationsFromCandidate: This data is taken from the information in the candidate's file.
Resume.DescribeJobs: You are also asked to describe your job and the context in which you were (or still are) working, as well as the responsibilities you were (or are) in charge of.
Resume.FirstImpression: The first impression we get of you is your resume. It is therefore important to ensure that you provide us with an accurate description of your previous jobs, including details of your responsibilities and skills.
Resume.IndicateAllDiplomas: Here you indicate all diplomas obtained and training courses completed to support your application.
Resume.IndicateYourPast: Indicate your past and present experience, specifying the title of the position held and the dates of employment.
Resume.IntroduceYourSelf: Introduce yourself and describe your current family and professional situation. You should then summarise your experience, without forgetting to highlight your assets for the position you are applying for. You can also describe your plans and indicate your availability.
Resume.MissingPhoto: You need to import a photo before you can start creating your resume.
Resume.NoQualifications: If you have no qualifications or training, please tick the relevant box.
Resume.PersonalProfileHighlights: Make sure that your personal profile highlights you in such a way that the client is attracted to your skills and experience. Making a good first impression with a professional photo and a clear and accurate resume is an important way to stand out.
Resume.RedirectMsg: You will be redirected to your documents.
Resume.RememberManyApplications: Remember that for some positions we receive many applications and if you do not meet the criteria of a good resume and a complete file, your chances of getting the position of your choice are greatly reduced.
Resume.RepresentMostTalented: We want to represent the most talented individuals in the industry and not just fulfill a search mandate. Our goal is your professional growth and success.
Resume.SendingYourCV: Sending your resume to our agencies
Resume.SpecifyStartEndDate: You should specify the start and end dates, the name of the degree and the location.
Resume.StepRequired: This step is required to generate your MMI resume in the last step.
Resume.WritePresentation: We invite you to write a presentation of at least 500 characters, corresponding to at least 5 lines in this field and with no maximum limit. This step is of crucial importance. These first lines of your resume will introduce your profile to try to seduce your future employer.

TOS.Act1: to ensure total confidentiality of all information, documents and data of any kind concerning the clients of Morgan & Mallet International of which the candidate may have had access or knowledge during a possible job interview (physical, telephone or internet Skype interview).
TOS.Act10: candidates applying online at www.personneldemaison.agency agree to receive our weekly e-mail newsletter. Candidates can request to be removed from our newsletter e-mail list by sending an e-mail to the following address: contact@morganmallet.agency.
TOS.Act2: not to use cameras, video cameras, mobile phones, smartphones and sound recorders during any interview with clients, either outside or inside their property, or in a public place.
TOS.Act3: not to post photos, videos, recordings, or post comments on social networks about Morgan & Mallet International Ltd's clients (on the Internet, on Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, Google plus, Blog and all existing social networks).
TOS.Act4: not to divulge any information, resell, to any private third party or company, recruitment firm, address, telephone number, family composition, home composition and any other details concerning the clients.
TOS.Act5: not to canvass or communicate (before and after the job interview) directly with clients of Morgan & Mallet International for employment, commercial or personal purposes.
TOS.Act6: not to accept an offer of employment directly from the client (even if different) without notifying Morgan & Mallet International Ltd.
TOS.Act7: to undertake to respect the obligation of confidentiality defined above.
TOS.Act8: the candidate agrees that he/she will not hold Morgan & Mallet International Ltd responsible for his/her remuneration or non-payment of salary, contract of employment, and working conditions, accommodation conditions offered by the client, and acknowledges that the Client/Employer will be fully responsible for his/her remuneration and conditions. Morgan & Mallet International Ltd is only an intermediary that introduces candidates and employers, it does not act as an interim agency.
TOS.Act9: by providing contacts and references from your current and former employers (telephone, email address, postal address, letter of reference) you are giving permission to contact your current and former employers for the purpose of conducting a career check.
TOS.Paraph1: You acknowledge that you have been informed that in the event of non-compliance with the above provisions, I shall be liable to all clients and to Morgan & Mallet International, which may legitimately make a claim for compensation for the loss suffered, this list being enunciative and non-limitative, in addition to any damages that may be claimed.
TOS.Paraph2: With regard to the application form, you acknowledge the accuracy and truthfulness of the information provided. Any false information concerning the application form and the documents provided to Morgan & Mallet International (CV, reference letter, work certificate, identity document, diplomas, etc.) may be used against you when you are hired or dismissed.
TOS.Paraph3: By ticking the box and filling in the form, you validate and accept the present conditions and engage your personal responsibility in case of breach of the above mentioned rules.
TOS.Subtitle: As a candidate, the candidate(s) hereby undertake to
TOS.TOSAccepted: You have accepted the terms of use
